heading: Director of bureau; appointment
label: 12 Director of bureau; appointment
text: The Women’s Bureau shall be in charge of a director, a woman, to be appointed by the President.
notes: CodificationPart of section 2 of act , constitutes .June 5, 1920section 13 of this titleWords “who shall receive an annual compensation of $5,000” were omitted in view of the Classification Acts. See sections 5101 et seq. and 5331 et seq. of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.
Amendments2012— struck out “, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate” before period at end.Pub. L. 112–166
